summary: Two brothers secretly carry rice sacks to each other's barns by moonlight until they meet and laugh at their shared generosity.

adaptationVersions.plannedAlternate: External editor pass after children’s editorial and Korean-language review
adaptationVersions.note: Generated repo-local repair draft; not external human final.

sensitivityNotes: The story stays quiet and humble; no grand reward is added.
Repaired by repo-local semantic authenticity pass; external children’s editor, Korean-language, cultural, and child-safety review remain required before final release.

text.enLittle: The brothers stacked rice sacks while moonlight filled the yard.
text.enStandard: In the two rice barns, first, the brothers stacked rice sacks while moonlight filled the yard. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.
text.koLittle: 형와 동생가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요

text.enLittle: The older brother worried about the younger brother's new household.
text.enStandard: In the two rice barns, next, the older brother worried about the younger brother's new household. "Then walk gently," the elder said.
